ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jun-15-2007 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-21-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-24-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Vicki Gross.
Colin Claxon, Esq. for Plaintiff: CLKS, Inc., a California corporation dba Stars Model Management., and KOKO Represents, Inc., a California corporation.
Plaintiff's Witness: Scott Claxon, Aubri Balk and Kerri Kokoszka, were sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Blue Marlin Corp., a California corporation.
Exhibit 1 - Request for Stetement of witness and evidence-----------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Photography Estimate-----------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3 - Invoice dtd 06-05-06-----------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 4 - Invoice dtd 06-05-06-----------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 5 - Star's voucher-----------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 6 - Assignment of claim on contract and for money-----------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defendant as follows:
Principal $13,076.13
Interest $1,088.92
Attorney's Fees $2,000.00
Costs $245.00 for a Total of $16,410.05
Counsel to prepare Judgment.
Counsel stipulated for the return of Exhibits in open court.

May 24, 2007
Judgment granted in total of $16,266.01
